scripts.install-dsi-4:
sudo bash -c "grep -q 'vc4-kms-dsi-waveshare-panel-v2,4_0_inch_c' /boot/firmware/config.txt || echo '
dtoverlay=vc4-kms-v3d
#DSI1 Use
dtoverlay=vc4-kms-dsi-waveshare-panel-v2,4_0_inch_c
#DSI0 Use
# dtoverlay=vc4-kms-dsi-waveshare-panel-v2,4_0_inch_c,dsi0' >> /boot/firmware/config.txt"
scripts.run: npm run backend & npm run frontend
scripts.install:
mkdir -p ~/.config/systemd/user && printf '[Unit]
After=graphical-session.target

[Service]
WorkingDirectory=%s
ExecStart=%s run run
Restart=on-failure

[Install]
WantedBy=graphical-session.target
' "$INIT_CWD" "$(which npm)" > ~/.config/systemd/user/oko.service && systemctl --user daemon-reload && systemctl --user enable oko && echo 'Autostart installed: ~/.config/systemd/user/oko.service'
scripts.frontend: npm -w @wojciechjerzy/oko-frontend run dev & sleep 2 && chromium --password-store=basic --touch-events=enabled http://localhost:8080
